name: teams-demo-page
description: Create demo page demonstrating teams feature with CRUD operations and permission resolution
acceptanceCriteria: Page displays form to create Organization when none exists
Creating organization displays org details and enables team creation
Add Team shows parent selector for nested hierarchy
Teams display with visual hierarchy (indentation or tree)
Membership management UI allows adding/removing members with role selection
Creating App shows in team's app list
Permission resolution demo shows effective permissions for a user across hierarchy
Loading states shown during async operations
Error states handled gracefully with retry options
